title: FairPack
description: Adds various Utility features for pvp, redstone and survival like transparent ui, shorter swords, lower shields, golden apple count without Optifine
body:
# FairPack by iFair_
**THIS PACK DOESN'T REQUIRE ANY ADDITIONAL DOWNLOADS like Optifine or CIT Resewn**

---

# Features

## Transparent UI
You can easily see if someone is approaching you whilst in the inventory.
There is also support for various mods, so it doesn't look unnatural.
![You can see clearly what's behind your screen.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f748d77cbc30d26a2e88efec193caede0a36f00.png)

## Clear HUD
HUD is way clearer and more useful with numbered hotbar and transparent bars.
![Transparent HUD. Clear hotbar, hearts and hunger bar. Unique xp bar.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bce7547808d3b52828f78089a320fcdddd837c0.png)

## Lower Shield
You don't get blinded and can see easily while using a shield.

**Idle**
![Lower Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a7ba1ccb1998d3bea8c23b1da19042ea46e59ae.png)

**Blocking**
![Lower Shield Blocking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ba5ca3500d0f5f93e1904c2912f851ee98d4045.png)

## Lower Fire
You can see easily even while burning.
![Lower Fire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8665870e05b9c2a2e489901df8cbdb7e13beaf38.png)

This is in Vanilla:
![Fire in Vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26badf4a1b6d09ad1790b7ff104373489db971c7.png)

## Fire Particles Removed
You can easily see around places with a lot of fire like the nether when looking for netherite.
![Fire particle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45c291953d19bb7cb5607d828b0825f675eb003d.png)

In Vanilla, they obstruct visibility significantly:
![Fire transparent](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e734cca2281ebe58677db31e61b56d8b17ccf72d.png)

## Redstone Tweaks
You can see Redstone Power Levels on top of the dusts. Also Redstone dust is way clearer.
![Redstone Power Levels are shown on top of the texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50354ea4d43c1c84c808bed3e3055c7f1d61346b.png)

Blocks like pistons, dispensers, hoppers, and observers have indicators that show if they are sticky, active or not, and which direction they are facing.
![Redstone Blocks Tweaks from sides and top.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84da40f41d88cf3f7be0685e669cdabfde17a0c3.png)

## Better Custom Shields
In FairPack, Custom Shields' textures are the same as the banners.
![Custom Shields' textures are the same as the banners'.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2e5e76846772e176b3feb8f36cc8e10c4cf3db9.png)

In Vanilla, textures are small and don't look like the actual banner.
![Custom Shields' textures are not the same as the banners' in Vanilla unlike FairPack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6a626f87bcf58a334b038d09b2c21ef3876ce1f.png)

## Enchantment Icons
You can see which enchantments are applied to which armor/tool. This supports EVERY language in the game.

![curse of binding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63c6f28e0da1edb444eff64f0fa3b1111eb4442b.jpeg)
![protection 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc25326d86899a5e7b34a2c85864a9cc52fc5d56.jpeg)
![loyalty](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4110c7b0d3271cf40114eb206517ed88a35e2c50.jpeg)
![feather falling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f39848bb4f74a92b274490934d412a7c012d538.jpeg)
![respiration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a78f362797b1801e3edd54f62bb88ae0296c482.jpeg)

## Golden Apple Count (Vanilla)
You can see your opponent's golden apple count in a fight. Golden Apple texture changes depending on multiple things:
> * **Base Texture:** count is even or odd
> * **Outline:** Count range (1-5, 5-10, increasing by 5)
> * **Number on golden apple:** Count

![Golden Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6831d60235e859e939c5f0083591e0978c379851.png)

## Shorter Swords
Like this, swords take up less space on the screen.
![Shorter Swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9068983d5bed6a0679dce69301b9243a40b86d78.png)

## Colored Stems
Small utility feature for seeing whether you planted pumpkin or melon.
![Pumpkin and Melon stems are different color](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b6ae46e22c762f3292fa2f00735d06a45b413c3.png)

## Custom Bee Blocks
You can see Bee Nests' and Bee Hives' Honey Level.
![Bee Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22cf9c33b12f6144c658b3b1bd0e372a450e789c.png)

# Lastly;
I'll add more features in the future. If you want to tell me something just dm me on discord.
**Discord :** ifair_
